prompt: I've been using AI to help build my React + Node.js side project for a few weeks but every single session I have to spend like 10 minutes explaining what we're building and where we left off. It's really frustrating. The project is a task management app called 'Flux' — I'm a frontend developer, the backend is mostly done, now I'm working on the React UI. Can you help me fix this problem?

assertions.name: HANDOFF.md created with no placeholders
assertions.text: HANDOFF.md is created and contains no unfilled {placeholder} patterns

assertions.name: CONTEXT.md reflects project described
assertions.text: CONTEXT.md mentions React, Node.js or Flux

assertions.name: DECISIONS.md has proper table structure
assertions.text: DECISIONS.md contains at least one markdown table with category headers

assertions.name: conversations/ directory offered or created
assertions.text: AI creates or offers to create a conversations/ directory

assertions.name: AI explains each document's purpose
assertions.text: AI provides explanation of each document, not just says 'done'
